title: Fishing Crates
description: Introduce fishing crates to your new world, a simple change to make fishing for loot easier.
body:
# Fishing Crates

### Additions
Fishing Crates adds a function to a combination of barrels and bamboo trapdoors,
with them you can set up a fishing crate that fishes up loot from time to time.

### Purpose
It allows you to catch fish, junk or treasure while you're away exploring or working on other projects.
Helps with gaining loot over a span of time, that may become useful in the long run.

## Functionality

### Loot Catches
There is an interval from 15s to 60s between each catch of loot.
However, if 4 or more fishing crates are in distance of 8 blocks to each other, then an additional 30s will be added to the interval.
Once reached an amount of 5 fishing crates or over, for every additional fishing crate after the 4th are 10s added.

### Loot Chances
- Fish Loot: 27%
- Junk Loot: 13%
- Treasure Loot: 6%

## Setup

### Materials
- 1 bamboo trapdoor
- 1 barrel

### Instructions
1. Look for a biome of any deep or not ocean, river, shore or beach.
2. Place a barrel facing upwards and have it be least 2 or more blocks under water.
3. Place a bamboo trapdoor on top of the barrel, making sure it is waterlogged.
